summary: Verified Jan-2026 feature batch: (1) Gallery resource_type on model & API, (2) Contact social URLs (instagram/spotify/facebook/youtube) persisted + rendered in Footer & Contact page, (3) About page no longer shows Influences. Backend 5/5 assertions passed, 1 skipped (video upload stub rejected by Cloudinary as expected for synthetic mp4). Frontend flows verified: Home hero Cloudinary+ProgressiveImage, About (no Influences, sections render), Contact (all 4 socials), Footer (all 4 icons), Gallery renders, Admin login redirects to /admin/home.

minor.issue: Review request referenced this as 'PUT /api/admin/contact' but backend implements POST. Works correctly, but doc/mismatch is worth noting.

Video upload path not exercised end-to-end because a synthetic mp4 byte stub is rejected by Cloudinary; storage.py routing logic (content_type startswith video/ -> resource_type=video) is implemented correctly. Recommend an integration test with a real small mp4 asset for full coverage.
CORSMiddleware is added TWICE (once at L55 and again at L203). The second registration may override first. Harmless in practice but should be removed.

verified_working.status: ProgressiveImage renders Cloudinary URL with transition-opacity; LQIP pattern applied
Influences section removed; Background/Approach/Quote/Connect visible (headings are uppercase CSS)
All 4 social links present (instagram, spotify, facebook, youtube)
All 4 social icons render (instagram, spotify, facebook, youtube)
Loads images correctly; no video items exist yet in DB so <video> tag path could not be exercised at runtime
admin/Kirti2024! logs in and redirects to /admin/home

minor_fixed.fix: Renamed lowercase `fetchpriority` JSX prop to camelCase `fetchPriority` to silence React DOM warning

action_items: Consider adding /api/admin/contact PUT alias if external docs/clients expect PUT (otherwise update docs to POST).
Upload a real sample video via the admin Gallery UI to validate end-to-end <video> rendering on the public Gallery page.
(Optional) Add seeded gallery video item for automated smoke tests going forward.
critical_code_review_comments: models.py GalleryImage.resource_type defaults to 'image' which is fine for backward compat; older gallery rows without the field will be absent — public endpoint returns them without resource_type if any pre-migration docs exist (none observed).
admin_routes.py upload endpoint correctly forwards content_type and returns resource_type from Cloudinary.
storage.py correctly routes video/* content types to resource_type='video'.
server.py has double CORSMiddleware (see minor issues).
ProgressiveImage used lowercase `fetchpriority` causing React DOM warning (fixed in this iteration).

success_rate.backend: 100% of executable tests (5 passed, 1 skipped due to synthetic mp4 limitation)

test_credentials.note: /app/memory/test_credentials.md file does not exist; credentials sourced from review request

seed_data_creation: Created 1 test image in Cloudinary via POST /api/admin/upload during test run. Contact info was updated to include TEST social URLs; these are now persisted in DB (instagram=https://instagram.com/kirti.killedar, spotify/facebook/youtube=TEST URLs). Main agent may want to restore real URLs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend feature batch verified. Contact doc row now contains TEST social URLs from last test — main agent should reset via admin panel before prod. No gallery video item exists; upload a real mp4 via admin Gallery UI to validate <video> render. ProgressiveImage fetchPriority casing fixed; hot reload picked it up.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs required RCA. Minor findings documented above.
